title: Importing monthly square sales data
excerpt: Looking to automate the import of monthly sales data from square into Monday boards. I’ve seen zapier integrations but i don’t see a trigger for monthly sales only singular sales transactions. I don’t need that much data…

posts.author: Mvmtmatters (Daniel)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking to automate the import of monthly sales data from square into Monday boards. I’ve seen zapier integrations but i don’t see a trigger for monthly sales only singular sales transactions. I don’t need that much data coming in just a monthly total.
